summary: Completed P0 Distribution Engine testing - All 28 backend tests passed and all frontend features verified via Playwright. OG meta tags, share pages, sitemap, creator profiles, and growth dashboard are working correctly.
seed_data_creation: 40 seeded videos by visionary-ai-system user verified
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 distribution features tested and working: 1) OG Meta Tags - Share page at /api/public/s/{slug} returns HTML with og:title, og:description, og:image tags, 2) OG Image - /api/public/og-image/{slug} returns 1200x630 PNG image, 3) Content Seeding - 40 seeded videos confirmed, explore shows 134+ total creations, 4) Social Share Buttons - Twitter, LinkedIn, Reddit, Copy Link buttons work on /v/{slug} pages, 5) Remix Prompt Display - Original prompt shown in dedicated section, 6) Sitemap - Valid XML with creation URLs at /api/public/sitemap.xml, 7) Creator Profiles - /creator/visionary-ai shows 40 creations with stats, 8) Growth Dashboard - /app/admin/growth shows all metrics (daily creations, remix rate, creator activation, public page views, total creations).

og_meta_tags.details: Share page returns HTML with og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, twitter:card meta tags

og_image_generation.details: Dynamic PNG generation at /api/public/og-image/{slug}, returns 200 with image/png content-type

content_seeding.details: 40 seeded videos confirmed via /api/public/seed-status, 134 total creations in explore

explore_page.details: Shows 134+ creations with thumbnails, views, remix counts, tabs for trending/newest/most_remixed

social_share_buttons.details: Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Reddit, Copy Link buttons present in sidebar with data-testid attributes

remix_prompt_display.details: Prompt display section shows original prompt text with 'Prompt used' label

sitemap.details: Valid XML sitemap with creation URLs at /api/public/sitemap.xml

creator_profiles.details: visionary-ai creator has 40 creations, 16386 views, 2021 remixes displayed

growth_dashboard.details: Admin dashboard shows daily creations (7), remix rate (2644.8%), public page views (16401), creator activation (12.1%), total creations (134), 7-day trend chart, trending creations list, health indicators

public_creation_api.details: API returns prompt, category, tags fields as expected
